title: NEO Session Contract
description: Machine-checkable spine of a NEO sandbox session. Every role reads/writes against this. Foundation note: full JSON Schema validation is PENDING; verify_session.ps1 currently enforces the 'required' arrays via pure PowerShell.

approved_paths.description: Globs (relative to S:\NEO). Every edited path MUST be a strict subset of these.

protected_paths.description: Never-touch globs. Any edit here is a defect.

destructive_ops.description: Any of these requires a pre-op snapshot artifact (checked by C4).

provider_spend_cap_configured.description: MUST be true before any unattended run. Provider-side (Claude API) cap, set by the human.

model_routing_policy.description: Cheapest-capable routing. C8 checks model_routing_log entries against this.

test_plan.description: Exact test command(s) promised at START. Guards test-command drift (C6).

fresh_audit_required_when.description: Fresh-context audit triggers. Tiny throwaway experiments need none.

state_surfaces.description: Layer-2 residue snapshots are required for EVERY declared surface (C5). Foundation/local sessions declare ['filesystem'].

volatile_paths_ignored_in_residue.description: Explicit, narrow allowlist of paths excluded from before/after residue diff. Keep tight; broad entries hide real residue.

account_label.description: Human-set label, e.g. 'neo-sandbox-openai'. Must contain no production/real markers.

environment.description: Must be 'sandbox'. Sandbox status is ATTESTED by a human, never inferred from the name.

human_attested_sandbox_only.description: Human declares this is a throwaway sandbox account with no real data. P7 requires true.

forbidden_real_data.description: Declares no real/production data may touch this account. P7 requires true.

external_accounts_registry.description: If non-empty, 'external_account' MUST appear in state_surfaces (C5 guard). Sandbox-only status is HUMAN-ATTESTED via explicit fields (P7), never inferred from the account name.

secret_redaction.description: C9 secret scan is HEURISTIC (shape-based), not complete secret prevention.

graduation_target.description: Non-null only for graduation candidates; triggers NEO_CONTRACT_CHECK.

na_justifications.description: Optional. END-gate only: maps a mandatory check id (C5/C6/C7/C10) to an explicit reason it may remain NA. Without an entry, NA on a mandatory check at END = FAIL.

residue_keep_paths.description: Optional, default empty. Globs for artifacts a test run may legitimately leave behind (e.g. dist/**, coverage/**). The verifier deletes every created file EXCEPT these. Kept files must be inside approved_paths (or NEO_SESSION) and disjoint from protected_paths (P11), and are reported as 'approved retained artifacts' — NOT counted as zero-residue. Zero residue = no UNAPPROVED residue.

snapshot_limits.description: Optional. If the snapshot root exceeds any limit the verifier FAILS (blocks) with a clear reason — it never silently downgrades to a partial snapshot. Defaults applied if absent: max_files 5000, max_total_mb 500, max_single_file_mb 50.
